1.title: Failure rate (server side errors)
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(dt.service.request.count, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.service_method }
| fieldsAdd service_method_name = entityName(dt.entity.service_method)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 10

2.title: Failure rate (client side errors)
2.query:
timeseries failure_count = avg(dt.service.request.failure_count, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.service_method }
| fieldsAdd service_method_name = entityName(dt.entity.service_method)
| sort arrayAvg(failure_count) desc
| limit 10
